named-query.name: UserEntryStar.getByUserAndEntry
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserEntryStar s WHERE s.user = ?1 AND s.entry = ?2

named-query.name: UserEntryStar.getStarredEntriesByUser
named-query.query: SELECT s FROM UserEntryStar s WHERE s.user = ?1 ORDER BY s.starredTime DESC

named-query.name: UserEntryStar.getTrendingEntries
named-query.query: SELECT s.entry.id, COUNT(s) FROM UserEntryStar s GROUP BY s.entry.id ORDER BY COUNT(s) DESC

named-query.name: UserEntryStar.getCountByEntry
named-query.query: SELECT COUNT(s) FROM UserEntryStar s WHERE s.entry = ?1

named-query.name: UserEntryStar.removeByEntry
named-query.query: DELETE FROM UserEntryStar s WHERE s.entry = ?1

named-query.name: UserEntryStar.removeByUser
named-query.query: DELETE FROM UserEntryStar s WHERE s.user = ?1
